title: erigeron minurioides
intro: Erigeron minurioides, also known as the low daisy or small fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Erigeron minurioides include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
